auth.signInTitle: Sign in to sync your profile and open your Daily Flow.
auth.signUpTitle: Create an account to sync your profile and open your Daily Flow.
auth.googleCancelled: Google sign-in was cancelled or failed.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.nameMax: Name must be 80 characters or fewer

app.resetConfirm: Reset today's flow progress? This will delete flashcards mined today and reset scores.

onboarding.title: Construct Your Path
onboarding.calibrating: Calibrating content ratios and setting up your learning workspace.
onboarding.proTip: Pro tip: Consistent short sessions beat long irregular ones. 15–20 minutes daily is the sweet spot for learning retention.

time.casualDesc: Light focus. Ideal for busy schedules.

strategies.inputHeavyDesc: Focuses heavily on reading and listening. Ratios: 60% Input, 20% SRS, 20% Output.
strategies.outputFirstDesc: Early speaking focus. Speak from day one. Ratios: 30% Input, 20% SRS, 50% Output.
strategies.balancedDesc: A harmonious split. Ratios: 40% Input, 30% SRS, 30% Output.

flow.setupRequiredDesc: Please complete your onboarding profile to generate your first session.

srs.title: Spaced Repetition (SRS)
srs.allCaughtUp: All caught up! You have no flashcards due for review today. Keep reading stories and mining new words to populate your deck.
srs.recallHint: How well did you recall this?

shadowing.title: Shadowing Practice
shadowing.subtitle: Listen to the native sentence, click record, and repeat it aloud (Arguelles Shadowing).
shadowing.simulatorTitle: Simulator Text Mode (for environments without microphone access)
shadowing.transcriptPlaceholder: Type target sentence to simulate speaking...
shadowing.micDenied: Microphone access denied or unavailable. Fallback to simulator text mode enabled.

output.title: Quick Output
output.subtitle: Practice speaking or typing from Day One. Speak/type a response to the prompt.
output.placeholder: Type your response in your target language...

conversation.title: {{language}} Conversation
conversation.canFinish: You can continue or finish for feedback.
conversation.reportPreparing: Your coaching report is being prepared
conversation.reportPreparingDesc: Your transcript is safely saved. You can leave and return while the critic evaluates it.
conversation.feedbackFailedDesc: Your transcript and Daily Flow completion are safe. Retry when the provider is available.
conversation.noCorrections: No reliable corrections in this sample.
conversation.disclaimer: This is an estimate from a short text chat, not a formal CEFR certification. It does not measure pronunciation or spoken fluency. Sampling confidence: {{confidence}}%.

completion.title: Today's Flow Complete!
completion.subtitle: Phenomenal work! You have finished all 4 steps of your daily sequential flow path.
completion.comeBack: Come back tomorrow to keep the flame alive!
completion.milestoneCi: Krashen's CI: Read interactive texts and mined keywords in context.
completion.milestoneOutput: Lewis' Output: Practiced writing production and active generation.
completion.milestoneShadow: Arguelles Shadowing: Repeated native phrases and recorded pronunciation.
